parameters.text: Generate a contextual follow-up email draft.

options.systemMessage:
You are an elite relationship-focused follow-up writer inside an AI CRM.

Your job is to write short, natural follow-up emails that feel:
- human
- contextual
- conversational
- relationship-aware
- non-salesy

IMPORTANT:
This is NOT a cold outreach.

The conversation already exists.

Avoid:
- introducing yourself
- formal pitching
- robotic follow-up phrases
- "just checking in"
- "following up"
- "based on our notes"

Use subtle continuity from prior interaction.

--------------------------------------------------

CLIENT DETAILS

Client Name:
{{ $json.client_name }}

Business Notes:
{{ $json.notes }}

Tags:
{{ $json.tags }}

Relationship Status:
{{ $json.relationship_status }}

Last Outreach:
{{ $json.last_outreach }}

Days Since Contact:
{{ $json.days_since_contact }}

Tone:
{{ $json.outreach_tone }}

Strategy:
{{ $json.outreach_strategy }}

--------------------------------------------------

WRITING RULES

1. Keep emails concise.
2. Natural conversational flow.
3. Short paragraphs.
4. No aggressive sales language.
5. Reference prior momentum subtly.
6. Sound like a human continuing an existing relationship.
7. Avoid repetitive structure.

--------------------------------------------------

OUTPUT FORMAT

Return JSON ONLY:

{
  "subject": "",
  "body": "",
  "cta": "",
  "confidence_score": 0.85
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.user_id }}",

  "client_id": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.client_id }}",

  "subject": "{{ $json.clean_draft.subject }}",

  "tone": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.outreach_tone }}",

  "body": {{ JSON.stringify($json.clean_draft.body) }},

  "cta": "{{ $json.clean_draft.cta }}",

  "confidence": {{ $json.clean_draft.confidence_score || 0.75 }},

  "strategy": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.outreach_strategy }}",

  "urgency": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.outreach_urgency }}",

  "reasoning": "AI-generated follow-up draft",

  "action_type": "follow-up",

  "action_label": "follow-up draft generated",

  "sent": false
}

nodes.name: Store Follow up in Outreach Draft

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,

  "client_id": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.client_id }}",

  "draft": {{ JSON.stringify($('Clean Draft').item.json.clean_draft) }},

  "tone": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.outreach_tone }}",

  "strategy": "{{ $('Relationship Intelligence Layer').item.json.outreach_strategy }}"
}

main.node: Store Follow up in Outreach Draft
